record_types.name: Winch_Status

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (synced to UNIX time or since system boot).

fields.name: Line_Length
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Length of line released. NaN if unknown

fields.name: Speed
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Speed line is being released or retracted. Positive values if being
released, negative values if being retracted, NaN if unknown

fields.name: Tension
fields.description:
Units: [kg]
Tension on the line. NaN if unknown

fields.name: Voltage
fields.description:
Units: [V]
Voltage of the battery supplying the winch. NaN if unknown

fields.name: Current
fields.description:
Units: [A]
Current draw from the winch. NaN if unknown

fields.name: Temperature
fields.description:
Units: [degC]
Temperature of the motor. INT16_MAX if unknown
